note: Direct gcloud live preflight was attempted separately and failed because configured live secret ids were unreadable in this session; the supported file-backed preflight path passed with the new openai-codex-oauth manifest.

dockerLive.details: E2E verified on real Secret Manager data. Discord bot online + slash commands registered. Both runtimes accept control requests and write stage receipts. Review fix: ZeroClaw gateway now boots with seeded [providers.models.openai-codex] (model gpt-5-codex, wire_api responses) instead of 503 needs_onboarding; runtimes/start.ts seedZeroclawProviderModel covers it with unit tests.

discordLiveResponse.mode: plain mention guide + request both dual workflow

runtimeBrowserVerification.summary: Static browser surface now serves both / and /runtime-browser-status.html with 200 responses; root redirects to the live status report and browser verification succeeds.
